news.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. has been notified by Nasdaq about a deficiency due to the delayed filing of their Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q. The company has not met the deadline for the filing, which has prompted Nasdaq to issue the notification. It is crucial for Plus Therapeutics to address this deficiency promptly to maintain compliance with Nasdaq regulations. Failure to rectify this issue could result in further implications for the company's listing on the stock exchange. It is essential for Plus Therapeutics to take swift action and meet the necessary requirements to avoid any negative consequences.
news.headline: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. notified by Nasdaq for delayed filing of Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q.

news.summary: Jayud Global Logistics Limited, a supply chain solution provider in Shenzhen, received a notice from Nasdaq stating they are not in compliance with the minimum bid price requirement of $1 per share for 30 consecutive days. The company has until November 11, 2025, to regain compliance, and it is currently trading below $1 per share. Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) mandates the minimum bid price, and if not met for 30 consecutive days, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A), the company faces delisting. Jayud has approximately six months to rectify this issue to avoid potential delisting from the Nasdaq Capital Market.
news.headline: Jayud Global Logistics faces Nasdaq minimum bid price deficiency, below $1.00/share for 30 days; granted 180 days to comply.

news.summary: In Raanana, Israel, on May 23, 2025, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ), a biotech company specializing in intranasal hydrogels, received a delisting notification from Nasdaq. The decision was based on a review of the company's SEC filings. Despite this, the immediate delisting of Polyrizon's ordinary shares under symbol "PLRZ" on the Nasdaq Capital Market has not taken place. The notification does not currently impact the trading status of the company's shares.
news.headline: Polyrizon (Nasdaq: PLRZ) receives Nasdaq delisting notice but no immediate delisting effect; no current impact on trading.

news.summary: Today, INNOVATE Corp. (NYSE: VATE) disclosed that its subsidiary DBM Global Inc. will distribute a cash dividend of around $5.5 million, equating to $1.42 per share, on June 16, 2025, to stockholders of record as of June 2, 2025. The majority stockholder, INNOVATE, anticipates receiving about $5 million from this dividend. Individual stockholders of INNOVATE will not be eligible for this cash dividend.
news.headline: INNOVATE's DBM Global to pay $5.5 million dividend, with INNOVATE receiving $5 million on June 16, 2025.

news.summary: A former Heisman Trophy winner and viral influencer will be live dealing blackjack and spinning roulette on the ReBet app and website based in Hanover, NH. This exciting event will allow users the opportunity to interact with the celebrity while playing casino games. Stay tuned for this unique experience!
news.headline: Celebrities Johnny Manziel and Bryce Hall to host live dealer night with blackjack and roulette on ReBet platform.

news.summary: San Francisco-based Marin Software Inc. (NASDAQ: MRIN), a digital marketing software provider for advertisers and agencies, recently announced receiving a Notice from Nasdaq regarding delayed filing of its quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. The notice, received on May 21, 2025, addresses the delinquency issue and potential non-compliance with Nasdaq listing qualifications. Marin's stock market performance is closely watched, making timely financial filings crucial. This development underscores the importance of adhering to regulatory reporting requirements for the company, its shareholders, and the market.
news.headline: Marin Software (NASDAQ: MRIN) faces Nasdaq notification due to late Form 10-Q filing, risking continued listing.

news.summary: In Miami, Florida on May 23, 2025, Oyster Enterprises II Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: OYSEU) successfully completed its expanded initial public offering. The Company closed the offering of 25,300,000 units, encompassing an additional 3,300,000 units exercised by the underwriters through their over-allotment option. Priced at $10.00 per unit, the public offering generated total gross proceeds amounting to $253,000,000.
news.headline: Oyster Enterprises II Acquisition Corp raised $253 million in a $253,000,000 Initial Public Offering in Miami, Florida.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in Estero, Florida, Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ) revealed its intention to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 at 8:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, August 7, 2025. The subsequent earnings call is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. This announcement came through a live webcast by the Company.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in Pleasanton, California, Movano Health (Nasdaq: MOVE) disclosed that it had been notified by the Listing Qualifications Department of the Nasdaq Stock Market about a lapse in filing requirements. The notice served as a reminder to the Company about the outstanding filing.
news.headline: Movano Health (Nasdaq: MOVE) notified of deficiency by Nasdaq for delay in filing Form 10-Q quarterly report.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. announced the release of its latest monthly portfolio update from April 30, 2025. The Fund, listed as AFB on the NYSE, disclosed its top 10 fixed-income holdings, with the City holding the highest portfolio percentage.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, the AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds announced distributions for its various funds. Notably, the AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF) would be distributing $0.0655 per share. The ex-date, record date, and payment date for this distribution are set for 6/5/2025, 6/5/2025, and 6/20/2025, respectively.
news.headline: AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds announce distributions: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund paying $0.0655 per share on 6/20/2025.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AWF] published its latest monthly portfolio update as of April 30, 2025. The Fund shared details about its top 10 fixed-income holdings including U.S. Treasury Notes and other investments. This release provides investors with insight into the composition of the Fund's portfolio as of the end of April 2025.

news.summary: Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), a leading global financial technology platform known for Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, disclosed that Sandeep Aujla, the chief financial officer, is set to speak at the Jefferies Public Technology Conference on May 28, 2025. The fireside chat is scheduled to commence at 8:30 a.m. Pacific Time (11:30 a.m. Eastern Time) and can be accessed live through an audio webcast on Intuit’s investor relations website.

news.summary: Exton, Pennsylvania - Bentley Systems, Incorporated (Nasdaq: BSY), a leading infrastructure engineering software company, has disclosed a dividend payout of $0.07 per share for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend payment is scheduled for June 12, 2025, and will be distributed to all stockholders holding Class A and Class B common stock as of the closing of business on June 3, 2025. Bentley Systems is trusted globally by infrastructure professionals for its innovative software solutions.
news.headline: Bentley Systems declared a $0.07 per share dividend for Q2 2025, payable on June 12 to stockholders of record by June 3.

news.summary: Denver-based company CSG (NASDAQ: CSGS) revealed today that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share of common stock. Shareholders of record by June 18, 2025 will receive the dividend on July 2, 2025. CSG specializes in assisting businesses in creating memorable experiences and facilitating seamless connections, usage, and payments for essential services. The company focuses on enhancing customer experience, billing, and payment processes.
news.headline: CSG Systems Int'l approves quarterly dividend of $0.32 per share to be paid on July 2, 2025 for shareholders of record on June 18, 2025.

news.summary: A prominent work management platform company, Asana, Inc. (NYSE: ASAN), disclosed the participation of its Chief Financial Officer, Sonalee Parekh, in upcoming investor events. Parekh is set to speak at the Bank of America 2025 Global Technology Conference on June 4, 2025, at 10:40 a.m. PT / 1:40 p.m. ET, followed by the Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference on June 5, 2025, at 7:50 a.m. PT / 10:50 a.m. ET. news.summary: Shareholders of SatixFy have voted in favor of the proposed acquisition by MDA Space. news.summary: On May 23, 2025, NetClass Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NTCL), a prominent B2B smart education IT solutions provider based in Shanghai and Hong Kong, delivered an update on its exclusive AI Foreign Language Teaching System. The system has been introduced in 71 colleges throughout 20 provinces and municipalities in China, benefiting more than 20,000 teachers and students. With a curriculum spanning 500+ courses and generating over 300,000 contextual dialogues, the program exemplifies NetClass's dedication to achieving a leading position in the smart education sector in line with its long-term strategic objectives.
news.headline: NetClass Technology Inc. updates on AI Foreign Language Teaching System deployed at 71 colleges across China, serving 20,000+ teachers/students with 500+ courses and 300,000+ dialogues. Commitment to market leadership in smart education industry.

news.summary: QCR Holdings, Inc. revealed that three Class II directors, namely Brent R. Cobb, Mark C. Kilmer, and Amy L. Reasner, have been re-elected to serve three-year terms at the annual stockholder meeting. However, Larry J. Helling and Donna J. Sorensen, J.D. concluded their directorship at the 2025 Annual Meeting, leading to a decrease in the Board of Directors' members from 13 to 11. The announcement was made in Moline, Illinois on May 23, 2025. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol QCRH.
news.headline: QCR Holdings Inc. annual meeting elects 3 directors, declares $0.06/share cash dividend. Board reduced to 11 members.

news.summary: A company based in Princeton, New Jersey, PMV Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: PMVP), focusing on precision oncology and developing small molecule therapies for various tumors by targeting p53, revealed that its President and CEO, David H. Mack, Ph.D., and Chief Development Officer, Deepika Jalota, Pharm. D., are set to attend upcoming investor conferences. This move aims to enhance engagement with investors through one-on-one meetings as the company advances its mission.
news.headline: PMV Pharma to attend investor conferences with CEO and CDO. Targeting p53; Nasdaq: PMVP. Important dates ahead.

news.summary: AEON Biopharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Irvine, California, announced on May 23, 2025, that they have granted a total of 102,880 restricted stock units (RSUs) of their common stock to newly hired non-executive employees. The awards were given under the AEON 2025 Inducement Incentive Plan and were approved by the Company’s Board of Directors. The grant date and vesting commencement date for these RSUs is May 21, 2025. AEON is currently focusing on developing a botulinum toxin complex for various therapeutic indications at the clinical stage.
news.headline: AEON Biopharma grants 102,880 RSUs to new non-executive employees under Inducement Incentive Plan.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Zhengye Biotechnology Holding Limited (Nasdaq: ZYBT), a leading veterinary vaccine manufacturer in Jilin, China, focusing on livestock vaccines, announced it received a Delinquency Letter from NASDAQ Stock Market on May 20, 2025. The letter highlighted non-compliance with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the delayed filing of its 2024 Annual Report. Zhengye encompasses research, development, manufacturing, and sales of veterinary vaccines.
news.headline: Zhengye Biotechnology Holding (Nasdaq: ZYBT) receives NASDAQ notice for late filing of Form 20-F for FY 2024.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Pelican Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: PELIU) priced its initial public offering, selling 7,500,000 units at $10.00 per unit. The units, comprised of one ordinary share and one right, are now trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "PELIU" from May 23, 2025. Each right grants the holder one-tenth of an ordinary share following the completion of an initial business combination. The Company, an exempted organization based in the Cayman Islands, made this announcement.
news.headline: Pelican Acquisition Corp priced IPO at $10/unit, offering 7.5M units for $75M, listed on NASDAQ as "PELIU."

news.summary: Mauricio di Bartolomeo, co-founder of Ledn, utilized a strategy of shorting the Venezuelan Bolivar during hyperinflation and is now borrowing against Bitcoin to hedge against the weakening US dollar. Ledn's loan book value reached $9.9 billion by the end of Q4. Guatemala’s largest bank integrated crypto infrastructure SukuPay to enable easier receipt of US dollars. NYU professor Austin Campbell claimed that banks are panicking over yield-bearing stablecoins, threatening their business model. Michael Saylor's company, Strategy, bought 7,390 BTC for $765 million, bringing their total holdings to 576,230 BTC with an unrealized gain of $20 billion. Bitcoin surpassed $109,000 following improved investor sentiment due to eased tariff tensions between the US and China.
news.headline: Ledn co-founder shorted Bolivar for USD during hyperinflation, now hedges USD with BTC loans. Ledn's loan book valued at $9.9B in Q4. Guatemala's largest bank integrates SukuPay for USD transactions. Concerns over yield-bearing stablecoins as banks fear competition. Strategy acquires 7,390 BTC for $765M, totaling 576,230 BTC. Bitcoin climbs past $109,000 amid positive investor sentiment.

news.summary: Today, Restaurant Brands International Inc. revealed that its CEO, Josh Kobza, and CFO, Sami Siddiqui, are slated to engage in a fireside chat at the Bernstein 41st Annual event. RBI, listed as QSR on the NYSE and QSR and QSP on the TSX, will have its top executives present at the event. This news comes out of Miami on May 23, 2025.
news.headline: RBI executives to speak at Bernstein 41st Annual Strategic Decisions Conference. CEO and CFO to participate in a fireside chat.

news.summary: Wilmington, Massachusetts - On May 23, 2025, Analog Devices, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADI) disclosed that the firm's Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer, Richard Puccio, is set to present insights on business matters and industry trends at the Bernstein 41st Annual Strategic Decisions Conference.
news.headline: Analog Devices' CFO to participate at Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 23, 2025 (41st annual).

news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, the Minister of Tourism, Ahmed Al-Khateeb, introduced TOURISE, a revolutionary global tourism platform for the next five decades.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia announces launch of global platform "TOURISE", redefining tourism with Minister Al-Khateeb, aiming to shape future possibilities.

news.summary: The company's portfolio strategy is centered on prioritizing a novel combination therapy of BBI-355 and BBI-825, along with advancing their new development candidate, BBI-940, which targets a novel kinesin program. This approach involves investing resources into these innovative drug combinations and potential treatments to ensure maximum effectiveness and success in future clinical developments.
news.headline: Boundless Bio extends runway to prioritize combination therapy and new development candidate BBI-940 for kinesin program.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Silvercrest Asset Management Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SAMG) announced its Board of Directors has approved a common stock repurchase program. The program allows for the purchase of up to $25.0 million worth of its Class A common stock based on market conditions. The shares can be bought back through various means such as open market purchases, privately-negotiated transactions, block purchases, or using 10b5-1 share trading plans in line with securities laws. The decision on prices and volume will be at the discretion of the company, considering market conditions and legal requirements. It's important to note that the stock repurchase program does not mandate the repurchase of any specific dollar amount or number of shares and may be halted or terminated at any point.
news.headline: Silvercrest Asset Management Group Inc. authorizes $25 million common stock repurchase program for its Class A stock.

news.summary: Members of the US House of Representatives have urged the Justice Department to investigate Donald Trump's May 22 dinner for his top memecoin investors, expressing concerns about potential foreign influence and corruption. A letter signed by 35 House members requested an inquiry into possible violations of federal bribery and the foreign emoluments clause of the US Constitution. The dinner, attended by a majority of likely foreign nationals linked to crypto exchanges, raised fears of undisclosed foreign contributions influencing US political campaigns. Protesters, including Senator Jeff Merkley, gathered outside the Trump National Golf Club where the event was held, demanding transparency. The complete guest list remains undisclosed, although Tron founder Justin Sun was confirmed present. The memecoin dinner could impact pending legislation in Congress, with calls for a DOJ investigation and proposed bills targeting "Trump's crypto corruption". Lawmakers are considering regulations on stablecoins, with concerns about Trump's ties to a crypto platform issuing its USD1 stablecoin, World Liberty Financial. House Representative Maxine Waters introduced a bill to limit access to cryptocurrencies for certain political figures. Senate Democrats are also planning amendments to address these concerns within existing legislation.
news.headline: House members call for DOJ investigation into Trump's memecoin dinner over concerns of foreign influence, with 35 representatives urging inquiry into potential violations of bribery and emoluments clause. Protesters demand guest list release, citing attendance of Tron founder Justin Sun. Legislation proposed to tackle "Trump's crypto corruption" may impact pending Congress bills.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in Dunkirk, New York, Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. revealed plans for its upcoming conversion process. This involves Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc., a Maryland corporation, becoming the new holding company for Lake Shore Savings Bank. The conversion includes transitioning Lake Shore, MHC from a mutual holding company to a stock holding company. As a result, the Bank will modify its charter to operate as a New York commercial bank and will henceforth be known as Lake Shore Bank. The process will include the offering of common stock by Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc., listed as "NASDAQ: LSBK" for interested investors.
news.headline: Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. starts stock offering for proposed conversion, forming a new holding company.

news.summary: A settlement has been reached between the aircraft manufacturer and the Justice Department, despite objections from the families of crash victims. As part of the agreement, the company will allocate millions of dollars to a fund for the victims.
news.headline: Boeing reaches agreement with DOJ to settle over 737 Max crashes, avoids guilty plea. Millions paid to victims' fund.

news.summary: Stocks decreased following President Trump's announcement of potential tariffs on the European Union, impacting the stock market. Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a decrease, but losses were reduced as nuclear stocks surged due to a White House executive order. Live coverage reported on this development in the stock market, with the details available on Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow rebounds after Trump threatens EU tariffs; nuclear stocks surge. Market updates on Investor's Business Daily.
Trump said Friday that U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel will form a “partnership,” after the Japanese steelmaker’s bid to acquire its U.S. rival had been blocked on national security grounds. -- CNBC

news.summary: Vivek Raman and Danny Ryan, co-founders of Etherealize, recently shared insights with Decrypt reporter André Beganski about the future of Ethereum. They discussed key aspects such as tokenization, institutional adoption, and the changing economics of the network. Raman and Ryan believe that Ethereum is on track to serve as the primary global settlement layer for Wall Street. Their discussion emphasized the platform's potential significance in these areas, highlighting the increasing importance of Ethereum in the financial world.
news.headline: Vivek Raman and Danny Ryan discuss Ethereum's potential as Wall Street's tokenization leader with Decrypt.

news.summary: In recent statistics, a total of 2,500 individuals were reported to have tested positive for the virus, with 150 new cases emerging in just the past 24 hours. Health officials also confirmed a significant increase in hospitalizations, with 300 people currently being treated for the virus. Furthermore, 20 new deaths were recorded, bringing the total number of fatalities to 150 since the outbreak began. Authorities have emphasized the importance of following safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: First union certification at Whole Foods by US for Amazon's grocery chain, a significant milestone.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Frank Boulben, the Chief Revenue Officer for the Consumer Group at Verizon (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ), is set to address the Cowen Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on May 28 at 10:15 a.m. ET. The speech will be livestreamed, and details on how to access it can be found on Verizon's Investor Relations page at www.verizon.com/about/investors.
news.headline: Verizon's Frank Boulben to speak at Cowen TMT Conference on May 28 at 10:15 am ET. Website for webcast info.

news.summary: Los Angeles, May 23, 2025 - Shoppers are in for a treat with the chance to grab exclusive discounts on high-end designer home furnishings as HD Buttercup, a well-known furniture store in Southern California, is shutting down after twenty years of operation. The store will be liquidating all its stock, offering customers a one-time opportunity to purchase top-tier items at reduced prices. This event marks a significant milestone for the store, which has been a go-to destination for furniture enthusiasts in the region. The closure sale is expected to attract a large number of customers aiming to take advantage of the unique deals before the store officially closes its doors.
news.headline: HD Buttercup, a prominent furniture store in Southern California, is closing after 20 years, offering final liquidation sale with significant discounts.

news.summary: In Warren, N.J., on May 23, 2025, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN) announced plans to extend the target demographic of TVGN 489 to now encompass individuals aged 65 and above. Previously noted in October 2024, the initial revenue outlook for the specialty care lineup stood at around $1 billion for its inaugural year, with a cumulative estimation over five years ranging from $18 billion to $22 billion. This expansion initiative is intended to widen the market opportunities for Tevogen's specialized pharmaceuticals. An updated financial projection, along with the risk adjusted net present value (rNPV), will be disclosed to account for the incorporation of the 65+ patient group.
news.headline: Tevogen Bio to include patients 65+ in specialty care pipeline, aiming for $1 billion launch-year revenue; 5-year estimates $18-22 billion.
